criteria_results.criterion: Migration file 021_prioritization_scores.sql adds effort_score INT CHECK (1-5) nullable and impact_score INT CHECK (1-5) nullable to both steps AND touchpoints tables
criteria_results.evidence: File read: two ALTER TABLE statements present. Steps: ADD COLUMN effort_score INT CHECK (effort_score BETWEEN 1 AND 5), ADD COLUMN impact_score INT CHECK (impact_score BETWEEN 1 AND 5). Touchpoints: identical pattern. No DEFAULT clause = nullable by default. Exact pattern match with migration 007.

criteria_results.criterion: Step interface in src/types/database.ts includes effort_score: number | null and impact_score: number | null
criteria_results.evidence: Grep confirmed: lines 93-94 in database.ts — effort_score: number | null; impact_score: number | null — placed after target_maturity (line 92) per special_instructions.

criteria_results.criterion: Touchpoint interface in src/types/database.ts includes effort_score: number | null and impact_score: number | null
criteria_results.evidence: Grep confirmed: lines 197-198 in database.ts — effort_score: number | null; impact_score: number | null — placed after position_y (line 196) and before created_at (line 199) per special_instructions.

criteria_results.criterion: Steps PATCH route (src/app/api/v1/steps/[id]/route.ts) includes effort_score and impact_score in EDITABLE_FIELDS
criteria_results.evidence: Grep confirmed: lines 21-22 in steps/[id]/route.ts — "effort_score" and "impact_score" present in EDITABLE_FIELDS array.

criteria_results.criterion: Touchpoints PATCH route (src/app/api/v1/touchpoints/[id]/route.ts) includes effort_score and impact_score in EDITABLE_FIELDS
criteria_results.evidence: Grep confirmed: lines 16-17 in touchpoints/[id]/route.ts — "effort_score" and "impact_score" present in EDITABLE_FIELDS array.

criteria_results.criterion: npx tsc --noEmit passes cleanly after changes
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_1.json reports typecheck status=pass, errors=0. 1 pre-existing warning (addEdge unused in flow-canvas.tsx) — not in owned files, documented.

criteria_results.criterion: DialogDescription in the Duplicate Workspace dialog includes the workspace name dynamically
criteria_results.evidence: Source read: settings/page.tsx line 273 — DialogDescription contains: 'A full copy of "{workspace.name}" will be created including all tabs, sections, steps, connections, teams, roles, people, and tools.' workspace.name sourced from useWorkspace() hook at line 36.

criteria_results.criterion: Text reads something like: 'A full copy of "[workspace name]" will be created including all tabs, sections, steps, connections, teams, roles, people, and tools.'
criteria_results.evidence: Exact match. Uses JSX " HTML entities for surrounding quotes. Template literal interpolates workspace.name dynamically.

criteria_results.criterion: The settings page body text paragraph also includes the workspace name for consistency
criteria_results.evidence: Source read: settings/page.tsx line 245 — body paragraph reads: 'Create a full copy of "{workspace.name}", including all tabs, sections, steps, connections, teams, roles, people, and tools.'
BUILD_RESULT_2.json reports typecheck status=pass, 0 errors. npx tsc --noEmit exited 0.

criteria_results.criterion: Each runbook card in the list view shows a text label like '3 / 5' next to or below the progress bar
criteria_results.evidence: Source read: runbooks-list-view.tsx lines 118-125 — progress bar wrapped in flex items-center gap-2 container. Bar div has flex-1. Span at line 124: className='text-[11px] text-[var(--text-tertiary)] shrink-0 tabular-nums' shows '{resolved} / {total}'.

criteria_results.criterion: Text uses existing text hierarchy (text-[var(--text-secondary)] or text-[var(--text-tertiary)])
criteria_results.evidence: Span uses text-[var(--text-tertiary)] matching the card's secondary text style.

criteria_results.criterion: Text shows resolved count (completed + skipped) out of total, matching playbook-view.tsx pattern
criteria_results.evidence: resolved = completed + skipped computed at line 94 (from IMP-014). total = steps.length. Label shows '{resolved} / {total}' with space-padded slash, matching compact fraction format.
BUILD_RESULT_3.json reports typecheck status=pass, 0 errors. npx tsc --noEmit exited 0.

quality_gate.note: Browser testing performed against production (stride-five-sigma.vercel.app). Production confirmed running pre-IMP-028 version — Duplicate Workspace section absent from settings page; runbooks route renders canvas. Iteration 105 changes verified via static source analysis on ralph/init-stride branch. All 14 acceptance criteria pass. 0 console errors observed across all visited pages.

improvements_found.observation: The resolved/total step count now appears twice per runbook card: once in the metadata row as '{resolved}/{total} steps' (line 114, pre-existing from IMP-014) and again as '{resolved} / {total}' next to the progress bar (new from IMP-046). The information is visually redundant — a user sees the same fraction in two adjacent locations.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H8: Aesthetic and minimalist design — every piece of information competes for the user's attention; duplication adds cognitive noise without adding value.
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Remove the '{resolved}/{total} steps' span from the metadata row (line 114) now that the progress bar label communicates it more visually. Replace with section name + date only, which provides non-redundant context.
